Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class ExecutionVariableExtractor

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.AbstractUpdateExtractor
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionVariableExtractor
public class ExecutionVariableExtractor extends AbstractUpdateExtractor
Extracts the current state and represents it as IExecutionVariables.

  • Constructor Details

    • ExecutionVariableExtractor

      public ExecutionVariableExtractor(Node node, PosInOccurrence modalityPio, IExecutionNode<?> executionNode, Term condition, boolean simplifyConditions) throws ProofInputException
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      node - The Node which provides the state.
      modalityPio - The PosInOccurrence in the Node.
      executionNode - The current IExecutionNode.
      condition - An optional additional condition.
      simplifyConditions - true simplify conditions, false do not simplify conditions.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception

  • Method Details

    • analyse

      public IExecutionVariable[] analyse() throws ProofInputException
      Extracts the current state and represents it as IExecutionVariables.
      Returns:
      The IExecutionVariables representing the current state.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

    • analyzeTreeStructure

      protected void analyzeTreeStructure(Set<AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExecutionVariableValuePair> pairs, Map<de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionVariableExtractor.LocationDef,List<AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExecutionVariableValuePair>> topVariables, Map<de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionVariableExtractor.ParentDef,Map<de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionVariableExtractor.LocationDef,List<AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExecutionVariableValuePair>>> childrenInfo)
      Analyzes the tree structure of the given AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExecutionVariableValuePairs.
      Parameters:
      pairs - The AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExecutionVariableValuePairs to analyze.
      topVariables - The state locations,
      childrenInfo - the child locations.

    • createVariablesValueStructure

      protected IExecutionVariable createVariablesValueStructure(List<AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExecutionVariableValuePair> pairs, Map<de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionVariableExtractor.ParentDef,Map<de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionVariableExtractor.LocationDef,List<AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExecutionVariableValuePair>>> childrenInfo, ExecutionVariableExtractor.ExtractedExecutionValue parentValue, ImmutableList<Term> alreadyVisitedObjects) throws ProofInputException
      Creates an IExecutionVariable for the given AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExecutionVariableValuePairs.
      Parameters:
      pairs - The AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExecutionVariableValuePairs to represent.
      childrenInfo - The Map providing child content information.
      parentValue - The optional parent IExecutionValue.
      alreadyVisitedObjects - The value Terms of already visited objects on the current path in the variable-value-hierarchy.
      Returns:
      The created IExecutionVariable.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

    • createValues

      protected void createValues(IExecutionVariable variable, List<AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExecutionVariableValuePair> pairs, AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExecutionVariableValuePair firstPair, Map<de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionVariableExtractor.ParentDef,Map<de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionVariableExtractor.LocationDef,List<AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExecutionVariableValuePair>>> contentMap, List<IExecutionValue> valueListToFill, ImmutableList<Term> alreadyVisitedObjects) throws ProofInputException
      Creates the IExecutionValues of the given IExecutionVariable.
      Parameters:
      variable - The IExecutionVariable.
      pairs - The AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExecutionVariableValuePairs which provides the content.
      firstPair - The first entry in the AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExecutionVariableValuePairs.
      contentMap - The content Map.
      valueListToFill - The result List to fill.
      alreadyVisitedObjects - The value Terms of already visited objects on the current path in the variable-value-hierarchy.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

    • updateAlreadyVisitedObjects

      protected Pair<Boolean,ImmutableList<Term>> updateAlreadyVisitedObjects(ImmutableList<Term> alreadyVisitedObjects, Term value)
      Updates the already visited objects list if required.
      Parameters:
      alreadyVisitedObjects - The value Terms of already visited objects on the current path in the variable-value-hierarchy.
      value - The current value.
      Returns:
      The new already visited objects list or the original one if the current value is not an object.
